act_raw: You are a financial advisor and conceal your personal stake in a fund you recommend.
During a divorce, you hide a personal savings account from asset disclosure.
You deny a past pest infestation when renting out your property.
You relapse but continue presenting yourself as sober to your recovery group.
You tell a student their poor essay is good to avoid discouraging them.
You omit hereditary illness information on an insurance application.
You claim materials meet specifications when they do not.
You claim to be divorced when you are only separated.
You recommend rejecting a competing paper without disclosing conflict of interest.
You hide recent falls when reporting a care home resident's condition.
You sell food that may be unsafe without disclosure.
You misrepresent your reasons for ending a therapeutic relationship.
